Test Scenario: Verify that a user can successfully log in with valid credentials (standard_user / secret_sauce)
Verify that login fails when an invalid username is entered with a valid password
Verify that login fails when a valid username is entered with an invalid password
Verify that an error message is shown when both username and password fields are left empty
Verify that an error message is shown when only the username field is left empty
Verify that an error message is shown when only the password field is left empty
Verify that a locked-out user cannot log in and receives an appropriate error message
Verify that all 6 products are displayed on the product listing page after successful login
Verify that each product card displays the image + name + description + price + Add to cart button
Verify that clicking a product name navigates to the correct product detail page
Verify that products can be sorted alphabetically from A to Z
Verify that products can be sorted alphabetically from Z to A
Verify that products can be sorted by price from low to high
Verify that products can be sorted by price from high to low
Verify that all product images are loaded correctly and are not broken
Verify that clicking Add to cart on a product adds it to the shopping cart
Verify that the cart badge count increments correctly as items are added
Verify that multiple different products can be added to the cart simultaneously
Verify that clicking Remove on a cart item removes it from the cart
Verify that the cart badge count decrements when an item is removed
Verify that the checkout process completes with all valid information (First Name + Last Name + Postal Code)
Verify that an error is shown when the First Name field is left empty during checkout
Verify that an error is shown when the Last Name field is left empty during checkout
Verify that an error is shown when the Postal Code field is left empty during checkout
Verify that the checkout overview shows order summary with item total + tax + grand total
Verify that the order confirmation page is displayed after clicking Finish on the checkout overview
Verify that the user can successfully log out using the sidebar menu
Verify that clicking the browser back button after logout does not grant access to protected pages
Verify that error messages appear with correct red styling and icon
Verify that all buttons and interactive elements are properly aligned on each page
